# cloudflare_oauth_scopes (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_oauth_scopes" "example_oauth_scopes" {

}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `max_items` (Number) Max items to fetch, default: 1000

### Read-Only

- `result` (Attributes List) The items returned by the data source (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--result))

<a id="nestedatt--result"></a>
### Nested Schema for `result`

Read-Only:

- `category` (String) Category for grouping scopes in the UI.
- `id` (String) The scope label to use in the scopes array when creating or updating an OAuth client.
- `name` (String) Human-readable name of the OAuth scope.
- `scopes` (List of String) The underlying resource scopes (Bach scopes) that define which resources this OAuth scope can act upon.
